race.comment: SWEET PRETENDER (8) has been knocking on the door of another win with three consecutive runner-up finishes over this course and distance and this is not an overly strong affair. Overdue and can finally break through. The well-related DON'T STOP ME NOW (9) (half to G2 winner Brave Song) gets in well at the weights with the claim and maps nicely for this from gate three. Looms as the main danger. POWER OF SUCCESS (3) was a touch plain last time out but the form prior was good enough for a race of this nature. Worth another chance. NEED FOR SPIETH (4) may have suffered from the dreaded second-up syndrome last time but go on the solid win here when resuming. Can bounce back. THE COPS (6) has been racing well in lesser company and may earn some minor money here.
